title: Honor Tharvi Ironstill
hook: Durog still carries a promise to honor Tharvi Ironstill and return her remains properly.
playerSummary: Temple access, difficult moral choices, and Durog's discipline all tie back to fulfilling his promise to Tharvi.
gmTruth: Use this thread for questions of self-mastery, rites for the dead, the weight of mentorship, and any scene that tests whether Durog can live by what Tharvi taught him.
